title: Link-Bearing Elements, Relations, Base URLs, and Crawl Graph · Mastery Check
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss Go decisions for link-bearing elements, relations, base urls, and crawl graph and accepts only compile and runtime changed-case evidence, explicit non-claims, and named network, DNS, parser, browser, accessibility, security, load, legal-review, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for semantic provenance-rich link graph. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, ca…
objectives: Distinguish navigation, resource, metadata, embedded, form, media, and alternate URL-bearing HTML elements.
Use first valid base semantics against final response URL and retain accepted and rejected base evidence.
Interpret rel tokens, canonical, alternate, hreflang, download, media, nofollow, and target under explicit owner policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Link Elements · changed case · Quiz Link Elements
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz Go team handles case 3739 during a redirect, DNS, body, and checkpoint fault exercise. Build deterministic Go evidence to classify link elements, base and relation semantics, rejected references, and provenance-rich graph edges; every body, file, timer, transport, goroutine, channel, collector, and browser-service request needs one owner; then inject one session, secret, SSRF, output, path, log, privacy, or retention fault and contain every derivative. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Distinguish navigation, resource, metadata, embedded, form, media, and alternate URL-bearing HTML elements.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Link Elements has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For Authorized site auditing and Go Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Link Elements, name the owner, permission, revision, Go, seed, URL, scope, robots, response, body, tree, record, frontier, goroutine, accessibility, report, cleanup, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Link Elements precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Authorized site auditing and Go Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Link Elements, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A quiz Go team handles case 9511 during a redirect, DNS, body, and checkpoint fault exercise. Build deterministic Go evidence to classify link elements, base and relation semantics, rejected references, and provenance-rich graph edges; release evidence binds source, modules, build settings, binary or image, configuration, policy, and restored state; then change one fuzz, race, mutation, capacity, binary, deployment, incident, restore, rollback, or residual-risk condition and reconcile release evidence. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Distinguish navigation, resource, metadata, embedded, form, media, and alternate URL-bearing HTML elements.

For Authorized site auditing and Go Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Link Elements, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: All relevant crawl links are anchor href values.

options.text: Declare Authorized site auditing and Go method semantics, target authority, credentials, body ownership, and byte and time budgets for the quiz Link Elements case
Predict Authorized site auditing and Go resolution, transport, redirect, status, representation, retry, and cleanup outcomes for the quiz Link Elements case
Run the smallest deterministic Authorized site auditing and Go request or response model and retain inspectable evidence for the quiz Link Elements case
Inject one changed Authorized site auditing and Go failure, verify bounded cleanup, and state live-network transfer limits for the quiz Link Elements case

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Edge Evidence
steps.instruction:
Write the quiz evidence note for Edge Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A quiz Go team handles case 7892 during a keyboard-first accessible report review. Build deterministic Go evidence to classify link elements, base and relation semantics, rejected references, and provenance-rich graph edges; release evidence binds source, modules, build settings, binary or image, configuration, policy, and restored state; then change one owner, seed, net/url, robots, sitemap, redirect, DNS, transport, media, or charset condition and reconcile provenance. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Store source and target identity, element, attribute, raw value, relation, scope decision, and observation separately from fetch state.

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Edge Evidence.
steps.why: Retrieving Edge Evidence through the concrete semantic provenance-rich link graph case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Authorized site auditing and Go Defend one difficult decision · Quiz Edge Evidence, keep Edge Evidence connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Store source and target identity, element, attribute, raw value, relation, scope decision, and observation separately from fetch state.
